title: senecio nudiusculus
intro: Senecio nudiusculus, also known as the "Sensitive Senecio," is a rare and endangered species of flowering plant in the daisy family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Senecio nudiusculus are said to include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. In herbal preparations, the plant is often made into a tea or infused oil, which can be used to treat a variety of ailments, including skin irritations and respiratory issues.
